SMTG_TMPL_CONT.BODY_TXT: Hello,{{AccRequestText}} request has been submitted and requires your approval. Please review the details:Employee:{{AccUserFullName}}Accommodation Type:{{AccTypeText}}Building:{{AccBuildName}}Floor:{{AccFloor}}Apartment:{{AccApart}}Bed:{{AccBed}}Employee notes:{{AccEmpNotes}}Please take action on this request by clicking one of the buttons below.
SMTG_TMPL_CONT.BODY_HTML:
Hello,

{{AccRequestText}} request has been submitted and requires your approval. Please review the details:

Accommodation Type: {{AccTypeText}}
Building: {{AccBuildName}}
Floor: {{AccFloor}}
Apartment: {{AccApart}}
